auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to Yamalé Legal to access your library, vault, and AI research.
auth.signInSubtitleLibrary: Sign in to browse the African legal library — statutes, regulations, and treaties across 54 countries.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create a client account to access the library, The Yamalé Vault, and AI research.
auth.signUpSubtitleLibrary: Create a free account to search African statutes, regulations, and treaties in the legal library.
auth.lawyerInviteNote: Lawyer accounts are created and invited by the admin team. If you are a lawyer, use the secure sign-in link sent to your email.
auth.formDidNotLoadSignIn: Sign in form did not load.
auth.formDidNotLoadSignUp: Sign up form did not load.
auth.formDidNotLoadHint: Try a hard refresh, disable ad blockers or privacy extensions for this site, or use another browser (Chrome or Edge). If it still fails, contact
auth.signInUnavailable: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please contact {email}.
auth.signUpUnavailable: Sign-up is temporarily unavailable. Please contact {email}.

home.heroBadge: African-built. African-governed. Reinvesting in Africa's legal future.
home.heroSubtitle: The first unified platform for African legal research — covering all 54 countries, AI-powered queries, and a curated network of African legal professionals.
home.foundersBody: A message from Meghan Waters, CEO — on the gap in African legal infrastructure, what we are launching with today, and how we are building this together.
home.platformTitle: Everything you need to navigate African law
home.platformSubtitle: Four integrated tools — from raw legislation to expert connections — built for legal professionals, investors, and governments operating across the continent.
home.featureLibraryDesc: Every African country's business laws, free to read, in one place. Search all 54 jurisdictions by domain and status.
home.featureAfcftaDesc: The AfCFTA compliance infrastructure your business — or your ministry — needs. The first step-by-step tool for cross-border trade.
home.featureAiDesc: Ask complex legal questions in natural language. Responses are drawn from African legal texts within the Yamalé Legal Library — not generic AI output.
home.featureVaultDesc: Courses, webinars, documents, and templates in mining law, M&A, corporate law, and tax — specialized expertise, on demand.
home.featureLawyersDesc: Find the right commercial lawyer in any African jurisdiction — fast. Curated, invitation-only directory.
home.identityBody: Yamalé is two entities, one mission. A committed share of platform revenue flows annually from the for-profit platform to the Yamalé Alliance nonprofit — funding Government Representation in Complex Negotiations, Community Rights Advocacy in Extractive Industries, and Government Systems Strengthening. Every subscriber is, in a small way, building Africa's legal infrastructure.

footer.tagline: African law, accessible to those who shape the continent's future.
footer.description: National and regional law and AI-powered legal research—in one place.
footer.disclaimerBody: Yamalé Legal Platform provides legal information for reference purposes only. Content is not legal advice and does not create an attorney-client relationship. Laws change frequently — always verify current status with official sources or
footer.termsAgree: By using this platform, you agree to our
footer.dataNotice: We collect usage data to improve the platform. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

marketplace.title: The Yamalé Vault
marketplace.subtitle: Premium legal education and practical resources built for African legal professionals. Learn, download, and apply with confidence in The Yamalé Vault.

landing.headline: Legal resources built for African practice
landing.subheadline: Courses, templates, guides, and books from practitioners who know the continent — browse, learn, and download with confidence.
landing.searchPlaceholder: What do you want to learn or download?
landing.exploreCategoriesHint: Pick a category to explore everything in that format.
landing.seriesItemsHint: Open any resource to preview, purchase, or download.

marketplace.paymentSuccess: Payment successful. Your purchased items are now available — open them below or under Purchased.
marketplace.emptyHint: Try another format, topic, or broader search keyword.
marketplace.cardDescriptionFallback: View overview, contents, and download or purchase options.

cartPage.title: Review & checkout
cartPage.subtitle: Review your cart and choose how to pay: hosted checkout with Lomi.
cartPage.emptyHint: Add items from The Yamalé Vault to get started.
cartPage.subtotal: Subtotal ({count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}})
cartPage.secureCheckout: Secure checkout — you will confirm payment on the provider screen (mobile money or card).
cartPage.lomiComingSoonMessage: Credit card payments are coming soon. For now, please use Mobile Money.

purchasedPage.title: Purchased items
purchasedPage.subtitle: Everything you own from The Yamalé Vault. Open an item for details, files, or downloads.

itemPage.paymentSuccessItem: Payment successful. You now have access to this item.
itemPage.paymentNotCompleted: Payment was not completed. If you already paid, wait a moment and refresh the page, or contact support.
itemPage.rateProductHint: Share your experience to help other practitioners decide if this resource is useful.
itemPage.rateStars: Rate {count, plural, one {# star} other {# stars}}
itemPage.choosePayment: Choose mobile money or card, then continue to pay.
itemPage.noFileAttached: No file is attached to this item. Contact support if you expected a download.
itemPage.instantDownloadHint: Access your file immediately after purchase
itemPage.languagesCountHint: Choose your preferred version at download
itemPage.fileFormatHint: Ready to view or save offline
itemPage.lifetimeAccessFreeHint: Free to claim — yours to keep
itemPage.includedDownloadDesc: View in browser or save to your device
itemPage.seriesBundleHint: Get all {count} guides for {price} at checkout
itemPage.exploreCollectionHint: Browse every country guide in this collection — preview, purchase, or download.
itemPage.valueExpertDesc: Structured legal intelligence for investors and counsel entering African markets.
itemPage.valueLanguagesDesc: Download the version that fits your team — switch languages anytime after purchase.
itemPage.valueAccessDesc: One-time purchase with lifetime access to updates in your Yamalé Vault library.

overview.title: Admin Overview
overview.subtitle: Manage users, laws, pricing, and platform content from the sidebar. Use the links below to jump to a section.
overview.quickActionsHint: Jump to a section or use the sidebar to navigate.

common.name: Name
common.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Allow popups to export PDF.

admins.title: Admin Management
admins.subtitle: Add admins by email and role, and view version control (audit log) of admin actions.
admins.addAdminDesc: Enter the email of an existing user to assign them a role (Admin or User). Lawyers are managed separately in the Lawyers directory.
admins.versionControlDesc: Who added, updated, or changed what. Filter by control type, action, or admin below.
admins.noAuditEntries: No audit entries yet. Actions (add law, update pricing, change user tier, add admin) will appear here.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage users and gift access to AI and other features by setting their plan tier. Change role in the table.
users.giftAccessHint: Setting a tier (Basic, Pro, Plus, Team) grants that user access to AI research and other plan features without payment.

export.footer: Yamalé – Confidential. This report was generated from the admin panel.

aiUsage.title: AI Usage
aiUsage.subtitle: Credits (queries) and token usage for the current month. Limits: Basic 10/mo, Pro 50/mo, Team unlimited.
aiUsage.disclaimer: Rough API-style estimate from input/output tokens (blended Haiku/Sonnet–class rates). Not a bill from Anthropic.
aiUsage.noUsageForMonth: No AI usage recorded for {month} yet.

refunds.title: Refund requests
refunds.introBeforeLomi: Customer-initiated refund requests. Approving triggers Lomi per
refunds.introAfterProviders: APIs and revokes access when the provider confirms completion.
refunds.noRequests: No refund requests in this filter.

revenue.title: Revenue & sales
revenue.subtitle: Analytics, subscriptions, and one-time purchases in one place. Use the tabs to drill into each area without hunting the sidebar.

vaultTab.title: Yamalé Vault
vaultTab.description: Vault purchase counts and revenue for any date range live on the Analytics tab (marketplace purchases × item price). This tab is for managing products, HTML, and the detailed purchase table.

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics
analyticsDashboard.subtitle: Paid AI plans (period + run-rate), one-time unlocks, and Vault sales. Pick a date window and a source to see totals for that slice.
analyticsDashboard.mixHint: Tap a band to filter the total above to that source.
analyticsDashboard.noRevenueInWindow: No period revenue in this window yet. Try a longer range or another day.
analyticsDashboard.scannedUsers: Scanned {count} Clerk users for subscription metrics.
analyticsDashboard.detailSubtitle: Row-level activity in the same date range as the cards above. Payment references are deposit or checkout IDs from Lomi where stored.

segmentDescriptions.all: Sum of estimated first payments for new paid subscribers in range, plus document unlocks, lawyer search unlocks, and Vault purchases (list / item prices).
segmentDescriptions.subscriptions: Estimated revenue from users who became paid subscribers in this window (first cycle from Admin pricing; not MRR).
segmentDescriptions.lawyerSearches: Lawyer search unlock rows in range at the configured list price.
segmentDescriptions.libraryPdf: Library PDF unlock rows in range at the configured list price.
segmentDescriptions.vault: Marketplace purchase rows in range, priced from each Vault item.

analyticsDetailTables.truncation: Showing up to {label} in this window; more rows exist — narrow the date range or use the dedicated tabs for full lists.

newSubscribers.title: New paid subscribers (in this window)
newSubscribers.subtitle: First billing cycle estimate · includes complimentary grants at $0
newSubscribers.empty: No new paid subscribers in this date window.

vaultPurchases.title: Yamalé Vault — who bought what
vaultPurchases.subtitle: Item title and list price at time of purchase (from catalog)
vaultPurchases.empty: No Vault purchases in this date window.

payg.title: One-time unlocks & pay-as-you-go
payg.subtitle: Library PDFs, lawyer search, AI query packs, AfCFTA — line amounts use the same list prices as the summary cards
payg.emptyLawyerSearch: No lawyer search unlocks in this date window.
payg.emptyLibraryPdf: No library PDF unlocks in this date window.
payg.empty: No pay-as-you-go rows in this date window.

subscriptionsPanel.title: AI subscriptions
subscriptionsPanel.subtitle: Paid AI plans (Basic / Pro / Team). Renewal dates come from Clerk metadata.

lawyerSearchesPanel.title: Lawyer search purchases
lawyerSearchesPanel.subtitle: Paid searches (30-day access). You can revert a row to revoke access.

libraryPdfPanel.title: Library PDF purchases
libraryPdfPanel.subtitle: One-time law PDF unlocks (pay_as_you_go_purchases). Also see totals on the Analytics tab.

vault.title: The Yamalé Vault
vault.subtitle: Books, courses, and templates. Prices are set here and charged at checkout (mobile money or card).

documentLanguage.label: Document languages
documentLanguage.hint: Upload one file per language. Purchasers who own this item can download every language you add. Language badges (e.g. EN, FR) appear on download.
documentLanguage.selectLanguageFirst: Select a document language before uploading.
documentLanguage.uploadMissingDetails: Upload succeeded but file details were missing.

errors.uploadedNoImageUrl: Upload succeeded but no image URL was returned.
errors.imageUploadNetwork: Image upload failed (network or blocked response). Check the browser Network tab.
errors.invalidCoverUrl: Cover URL must be a valid https Cloudinary link (res.cloudinary.com).
errors.uploadMissingFileDetails: Upload succeeded but file details were missing. Check Supabase storage and env.
errors.uploadNetwork: Upload failed (network or blocked response). Check the browser Network tab.

notices.syncedModules: Synced {modules} files across {phases} phase folder(s) from the ZIP.

confirm.deleteItemDescription: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
confirm.revokePurchaseDescription: Revoke this purchase? The user will lose access and can purchase again.

fields.title: Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description for the product page
fields.youtubeHint: If provided, this video will be embedded on the public product page (for trailers, intros, or walkthroughs).
fields.courseZipHint: For course items, upload a ZIP then save and use Sync modules from ZIP when editing.
fields.youtubeHintShort: Used to embed a YouTube clip on the product page.
fields.onlineCourseTitle: Purchasers get View course and the online implementation workspace

list.standaloneHintBefore: Standalone vault items only. Items in a series are managed in
list.standaloneHintAfter: above and appear on the public vault inside that series.

empty.noStandaloneItems: No standalone items — all vault products are in a series. Add a new item or open a series to manage them.
empty.noItemsYet: No items in The Yamalé Vault yet. Add one above.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.subtitle: View which users currently own items from The Yamalé Vault. You can revoke a purchase so that the user can purchase again.

packageOffersFields.title: Dual pricing (standalone kit + bundle add-on)
packageOffersFields.subtitle: For ZIP packages with a custom landing page. Shows two checkout options: standalone kit and bundle with another vault item.
packageOffersFields.standalonePriceHint: e.g. $199 — "Get the Kit" on the landing page
packageOffersFields.bundleAddonPriceHint: e.g. $129 — also used as this item's vault list price when saved
packageOffersFields.bundleHint: Bundle checkout charges the add-on (e.g. $129) plus the selected vault item's list price. Customers receive access to both the kit and the partner item after payment.

itemPackFields.title: Multi-item pack
itemPackFields.subtitle: Pair this item with one or more other vault items. Customers can buy this item alone or the whole pack at the price you set below.
itemPackFields.wholePackPriceHint: Charged when a customer buys the full pack. Individual items keep their own list prices.
itemPackFields.noOptionsHint: Publish other paid items first to pair them.
itemPackFields.packIncludesHint: This item is always included in the pack. Selected partners are unlocked together at checkout.

marketplaceCoverImageField.helpText: Shown on Vault cards and the product page. Stored in Cloudinary. JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC — max {maxMb} MB.
marketplaceCoverImageField.saveReadyHint: Cover ready — save the item to publish on the Vault.
marketplaceCoverImageField.framingHelp: Adjust how the cover is cropped inside the 16:9 Vault card. Use Top for tall covers with titles near the top edge.

focusCountrySelect.label: Focus country (map on card)
focusCountrySelect.hint: Shown on the vault card when no cover image is set. Pick a country for a country map, or leave blank for the Africa continent.

subcategorySelect.label: Vault series (optional)
subcategorySelect.hint: Free series apply when price is $0. Paid series apply at any price.
subcategorySelect.loadedManageHint: Manage series with Add series on the marketplace admin page.

quickInvestmentGuide.before: Quick Investment Guide: upload series cover in the series editor, or use static

virusScanBanner.scanningHint: Checking file with VirusTotal before storage.
virusScanBanner.uploadingHint: New files can take up to 2 minutes. Please keep this tab open.

logoCropModal.title: Crop & resize logo
logoCropModal.instructions: Pan: drag the crop box. Resize: drag corners or edges. Zoom: use the slider above.
logoCropModal.outputHint: Smaller width reduces file size; logo will scale up on the page if needed.

heroImageCropModal.title: Crop & resize main page image
heroImageCropModal.instructions: Pan: drag the crop box. Resize: drag corners or edges. Zoom: use the slider above.
heroImageCropModal.outputHint: Smaller width reduces file size; image will scale up on the page if needed.

seriesEditor.seriesSaved: Series saved. You can keep editing or close when finished.

coverModes.saveReadyHint: Cover ready — click Save at the bottom to publish this item cover.

deleteSeries.title: Delete series
deleteSeries.builtinNote: This is a built-in series: the catalog definition remains in code, but saved metadata and item grouping will be removed.

errors.loadedWrongSeries: Loaded the wrong series. Close and try again.
errors.uploadMissingFileDetails: Upload succeeded but file details were missing.
errors.addAtLeastOneItem: Add at least one item with a title
errors.invalidCoverUrl: Cover URL must be a valid https Cloudinary link.

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure pricing, AI usage, and admin access. Use the links below to jump straight to a settings area.
settings.areasSubtitle: These pages control how the platform behaves for all users.

branding.label: Branding & logo
branding.description: Logo and founder portrait for the founder's note.

pricing.label: Pricing & plans
pricing.description: Edit subscription tiers and one-off pricing.

aiUsage.label: AI usage & limits
aiUsage.description: Review AI credits and token consumption.

mfa.label: Admin second factor (TOTP)
mfa.description: Enroll or verify your authenticator app for admin step-up.

security.label: Session security
security.description: Set how long admins stay verified before re-entering their code.

security.title: Session security
security.subtitle: Control how long an admin stays verified after entering their authenticator code. Shorter windows are more secure.

timeout.label: Re-enter code after inactivity
timeout.hint: After this period without activity in the admin panel, admins must enter their authenticator code again. The default is 30 minutes.
timeout.neverWarning: Choosing “Never” means the admin session stays verified until sign-out or the 12-hour maximum. This is unsafe on shared or lost devices — anyone with the session can reach the admin panel without a code.

content.title: Content Management
content.subtitle: Manage the core content that powers the platform: library entries, The Yamalé Vault products, and the lawyer directory.
content.areasSubtitle: Choose what you want to manage.
content.pricingHintPrefix: To change day pass, lawyer search, print, and other one-off prices, go to

laws.label: Library & laws
laws.description: Add, update, and curate the legal library.

vault.label: The Yamalé Vault items
vault.description: Manage books, courses, and templates for sale.

lawyers.label: Lawyers directory
lawyers.description: Maintain lawyer profiles shown to users.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Edit subscription tiers above. Below, edit the five pay-as-you-go prices shown on the public pricing page.

mfa.title: Admin second factor

descriptions.redirectedNeedsSetup: Before you can use the admin panel, set up an authenticator app.
descriptions.needsSetup: Set up an authenticator app before using the admin panel.
descriptions.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

mfa.enforcedBanner: Admin MFA is enforced on this environment. You must complete this step to continue.
mfa.sessionExpired: Your admin session expired due to inactivity. Enter your authenticator code to continue.
mfa.setupHint: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app. Scan the QR code and confirm with a one-time code.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.

launchMetricsReset.title: Reset launch metrics
launchMetricsReset.intro: Clears Supabase purchase and usage rows so <revenue>Revenue & analytics</revenue> and <aiUsage>AI usage</aiUsage> start fresh after go-live. This does <not>not</not> change Clerk subscription metadata — paid tiers in Clerk may still show in subscription estimates until you adjust users manually.
launchMetricsReset.warning: Clearing revenue data removes vault purchases, library PDF unlocks, lawyer unlocks, and related PAYG rows. Customers will lose access tied only to those purchase records.

aiModeration.title: AI quality
aiModeration.subtitle: Bug triage, auto corpus gaps, and user-flagged feedback in one workspace.

bugs.title: AI bug reports
bugs.subtitle: Negative AI feedback with conversation snapshots. Open a row for full triage.

corpusGaps.title: Auto corpus & excerpt gaps
corpusGaps.subtitle: Created automatically when the assistant says material is missing from the library, not in the excerpt, or nothing was retrieved. Reporter is the user who asked the question.
corpusGaps.empty: No auto gap flags in this view.

feedback.title: Flagged chat feedback
feedback.subtitle: Negative ratings submitted from the AI assistant.

synonyms.title: Legal query synonyms
synonyms.subtitle: Expand FTS queries for spelling variants, plurals, and cross-language terms (e.g. trademark ↔ trade mark).

notFound.title: Retrieval not-found log
notFound.subtitle: Queries where low-confidence retrieval triggered the law-title resolver fallback before generation.

aiBugDetail.title: AI bug report
aiBugDetail.conversationMissingHint: (Query log row missing or empty — check ai_query_log in Supabase.)

corpusGapDetail.title: Corpus gap — {lawTitle}
corpusGapDetail.chatEmpty: No conversation stored. Open the linked bug report or check query log in Supabase.
corpusGapDetail.adminNotesPlaceholder: Ingestion task, false positive, excerpt budget, etc.

list.title: Laws
list.subtitle: View and add laws. Use filters to narrow by country, category, or status.

search.label: Search
search.placeholder: Search by title or source name…

duplicates.checkAction: Check duplicates in this category (within each country)
duplicates.selectCategoryHint: Select a category to check duplicates within each country.
duplicates.noneFound: No duplicates found for this country and category.

export.allRegions: All regions (each in its own sheet)

confirm.updateTreatyDescription: Set treaty type to "{treatyType}" for {count} laws?
confirm.deleteDescription: Delete {count} laws? Bookmarks and related data will be removed. This cannot be undone.

errors.exportAlert: Could not export laws. Please try again.

table.selectAllAria: Select all laws on this page
table.title: Title

add.title: Add law
add.subtitle: Upload a PDF, paste content, or import from a PDF URL. The importer removes table-of-contents blocks, converts to Markdown, and can suggest title and jurisdiction.

messages.categoryAlreadySelected: Category "{name}" already existed and was selected.
messages.previewLoadedClaude: Preview loaded (Claude suggested title and jurisdiction). Table of contents was removed. Review and edit below, then save.
messages.previewLoaded: Preview loaded. Table of contents was removed. Review title, country, and category, then save.
messages.previewNeedsManual: If country or category is missing, select them manually before saving.
messages.addedSuccess: Law added successfully. You can add another below.

errors.invalidUrl: Enter a valid http(s) URL to a PDF.
errors.previewFirst: Click "Preview import" first, or switch to Upload / Paste.
errors.countryRequired: Select at least one country, or enable "All countries" for treaties and regional instruments.
errors.selectPdf: Please select a PDF file, or switch to "Paste content" to enter text.
errors.pdfTooLarge: This PDF is too large for browser upload ({sizeMb}MB). Use a smaller file or the CLI script for very large laws.
errors.pasteRequired: Paste the law content in the text area, or switch to "Upload PDF".
errors.uploadTooLarge: Upload is too large. Try a smaller PDF, disable OCR, or use the CLI import script.
errors.emptyPdfExtract: No usable text could be extracted from this PDF. Enable “Force OCR” for scanned files, paste the text, or use a PDF with a selectable text layer.
errors.requestTimeout: Request took too long. Try a smaller PDF or use "Paste content" for very large documents.
errors.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Restart the dev server if you changed upload limits in next.config; for very large PDFs use the CLI import script.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

mode.title: How do you want to add the law?

allCountries.title: All countries
allCountries.hint: One law record for treaties and instruments that apply across every jurisdiction (appears when filtering by any country).

countries.label: Countries
countries.disabledHint: Disabled because All countries is enabled.

categories.label: Categories
categories.hint: The law appears in the library under every category you tick. The first selected is the primary label used in some views.

url.label: PDF URL
url.hint: The server fetches the PDF, removes table-of-contents blocks, converts text to Markdown, and suggests title and country/category when CLAUDE_API_KEY is set; otherwise it uses heuristics.
url.readyHint: Content loaded into the fields below. Adjust country, category, title, and the Markdown body if needed, then save with "Add law".

ocr.forceHint: Use if the PDF is scanned or has little selectable text.
ocr.uploadHint: Check if the PDF is scanned or has little extractable text. OCR uses Tesseract and may take longer.

upload.label: PDF file
upload.hint: Text will be extracted and stored for the library. For scanned PDFs, enable Force OCR below — otherwise the law may be saved without full text.
upload.sizeHint: PDFs up to {maxMb} MB are supported. Files over 4 MB upload directly to storage to avoid server size limits.
upload.waitHint: Large PDFs or OCR can take 1–2 minutes. Please wait and do not refresh.

content.label: Law content
content.placeholder: Paste the full text of the law here. You can use plain text or Markdown (headings, lists, etc.).
content.hint: Plain text or Markdown. The library will detect and render Markdown when viewing.
content.urlReadySuffix: Edits here are saved when you click Add law.

add.levelHint: National statute, regional instrument (e.g. ECOWAS, OHADA), or international treaty.

edit.title: Edit law
edit.subtitle: Update metadata (title, country, category, etc.) and/or the law text. Changes apply to the library and AI.
edit.readOnlyHint: You can view this law but cannot edit it because it was added by another admin.

allCountries.title: All countries
allCountries.hint: Use for treaties and instruments that apply across all jurisdictions in the library (one record; appears in every country filter).

countries.hint: Tick additional countries to create a copy of this law for each one on save. Countries already assigned are locked; remove a country variant from the laws list if needed.

categories.label: Categories
categories.hint: The law is listed under each selected category in the library. The first ticked is the primary label in some views.

linked.title: Linked law
linked.hint: Saving changes to title, categories, year, status, treaty type, or body text will also update {count} other country variants in this group. Country assignment is not synced.

findReplace.title: Find and replace all
findReplace.hint: Find a repeated typo or phrase and replace it everywhere in this law's text. Leave "Replace with" empty to delete all occurrences.
findReplace.replaced: Replaced {count} occurrences. Save changes to persist.

pdfImport.title: Replace text from a PDF
pdfImport.hint: Upload a PDF to extract its text into the field below. Review the result, then Save changes to store it. For scanned PDFs, enable Force OCR.
pdfImport.sizeHint: PDFs up to {maxMb} MB are supported. Files over 4 MB upload directly to storage. Extraction does not save until you click Save changes.
pdfImport.extracted: Extracted {count} characters into the field below. Review, then Save changes to store it.
pdfImport.extractFailed: Could not extract text from that PDF.
pdfImport.confirmReplaceDescription: This will overwrite the current law text in the editor with the text extracted from the PDF. Nothing is saved until you click Save changes.

lawText.label: Law text
lawText.hint: Raw text used by the library view and AI. Edit to fix typos or update content.

confirm.fixOcrDescription: OCR noise will be reduced and stored text will be replaced. Very large laws can take several minutes.
confirm.deleteDescription: Delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone and the law will be removed from the library and AI.
confirm.updateLinkedDescription: This law is in a shared link group. Saving will apply the same title, categories, year, status, treaty type, and law text to {peers} other linked laws ({total} laws in total). Country assignment stays separate for each law.

messages.categoryAlreadySelected: Category "{name}" already existed and was selected.
messages.ocrCleanedRefresh: OCR cleaned. Refresh if the editor text looks stale.
messages.savedWithPropagation: Changes saved. {count} linked country variants updated to match.
messages.savedWithNewCountries: Changes saved. Law added to {count} additional {count, plural, one {country} other {countries}}.

errors.countryRequired: Select a country, or enable "All countries" for treaties and regional instruments.

ragApproval.pendingTitle: Not yet approved for AI retrieval
ragApproval.pendingHint: This law was imported recently and is hidden from AI Research until you approve it.

confirm.approveDescription: This law will appear in AI Research retrieval after approval.
confirm.revokeDescription: This law will be removed from AI Research retrieval until approved again.

messages.revoked: AI approval revoked — law is pending review again.

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update RAG approval status.

edit.levelHint: National statute, regional instrument (e.g. ECOWAS, OHADA), or international treaty.

ragApproval.title: RAG approval queue
ragApproval.subtitle: New imports stay pending until approved. Approved laws are included in AI Research retrieval.
ragApproval.hint: Review law text before approving. Pending laws are excluded from AI answers.

confirm.approveDescription: Approve {count} {count, plural, one {law} other {laws}} for AI Research retrieval?
confirm.revokeDescription: Revoke AI approval for {count} {count, plural, one {law} other {laws}}? They will be hidden from retrieval until approved again.

table.selectAllAria: Select all laws on this page
table.title: Title

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load RAG approval queue.

documentLanguage.label: Document language
documentLanguage.hint: Shown to readers as a language badge (e.g. FR, EN) on the law in the library.

fixOcr.title: Fix OCR with AI
fixOcr.subtitle: Choose a country and run Claude on each law to remove OCR noise and tidy formatting. Large instruments are processed in chunks. Use dry run first to preview without saving.
fixOcr.countryHint: Hold Cmd/Ctrl to select multiple countries.
fixOcr.dryRun: Dry run (preview only, no database writes)

linked.title: Linked laws
linked.subtitle: Laws in a shared link group stay in sync when you edit shared fields from any member. Unlinking only removes the group - each law keeps whatever title, text, and categories it has now.

confirm.unlinkGroupDescription: Stop syncing {count} laws. Each law keeps its current title, text, categories, and country - only the shared link is removed. Future edits to one law will not propagate to the others.
confirm.removeAndDissolveDescription: Removing "{country}" leaves only one linked law, so the whole group will be dissolved. That law keeps its current content.
confirm.removeFromGroupDescription: Remove "{title}" ({country}) from this link group. Its content stays as-is; the other laws remain linked.

linkByTitle.title: Link laws by title

foundersNotePage.metaDescription: Why we built Yamalé — a message from Meghan Waters, CEO, on the gap in African legal infrastructure and building the platform together.
foundersNotePage.footerHint: You can return to this page anytime from the footer under
foundersNotePage.title: Why We Built Yamalé
paragraphs: For all the years I have worked across Africa, with governments, with businesses, with communities navigating some of the continent's most complex legal and governance challenges, the problem was always the same. The law was everywhere and nowhere at once.

Companies spent weeks hunting down investment codes. Lawyers kept personal PDF libraries because no reliable central source existed. Critical laws sat only in outdated paper gazettes or on broken ministry websites. When we needed a specific article of an OHADA Uniform Act, or had to check whether a mining permit complied with national law, we lost hours, sometimes days, just finding and confirming the text.

The cost was never only in lost time. It was a barrier to investment, to compliance, to accountability, and to the cross-border trade that the African Continental Free Trade Area promises but cannot deliver without functioning legal infrastructure.

In January 2026, we built Yamalé. It is a nonprofit and a platform working together. The nonprofit continues the advisory work we have always done, supporting governments in high-stakes negotiations, helping mining communities protect their rights, and strengthening institutions. The platform builds the infrastructure that work depends on: a comprehensive, AI-powered legal library covering all 54 African countries, tools for AfCFTA compliance, and a marketplace for specialized legal expertise.

Yamalé is a community platform, and we want to be honest with you from day one about where it stands. We have laws for every African country, though some are still being cleaned up from old scanned documents. The Vault of expert content for sale is modest at launch and will grow steadily. The directory of vetted lawyers is invitation-only for now, by design, as we build it with care. The AfCFTA Passport, our step-by-step compliance tool for cross-border trade, is still in development and will launch later this year.

We are launching now because a resource that grows alongside its users is worth far more than one perfected in private and delivered too late. The current alternative, scattered and often unreliable legal information, is not serving anyone well enough.

This platform will only work if we are honest with each other. We are telling you what is ready and what is not, and we are asking you to do the same in return. The people best placed to make Yamalé stronger are the ones who will use it every day. If something needs fixing, please tell us. If a law you rely on is missing, submit it. If a document is wrong or out of date, flag it. If you are a lawyer or legal expert who wants to contribute, apply to join our network. Every correction, every contribution, and every honest piece of feedback shapes what this platform becomes.

Yamalé exists because African businesses, governments, and legal professionals deserve the same access to legal infrastructure that people in other regions take for granted. We are building it together, and we hope you will help us build it well.

ocrDisclaimer.fullTitle: Library texts are being cleaned after OCR
ocrDisclaimer.compactBody: This law was digitized from a scan. You may see stray characters, odd line breaks, or duplicate headings while we review it. Use <flag></flag> in the toolbar to report errors.
ocrDisclaimer.fullBody: Many instruments were added from official gazettes and PDFs using optical character recognition (OCR). We are cleaning them over time. Until a document is fully reviewed, you may notice stray characters, broken formatting, duplicated headings, or gaps in the text. If something looks wrong, open the law and use <flag></flag> in the toolbar. Always verify important points against the official gazette or source named on the document.

bullets: All information provided is true, accurate, and complete to the best of my knowledge
I am duly licensed to practice law in the stated jurisdiction(s)
I am in good standing with the relevant bar association(s)
I have read and agree to Yamalé Legal Platform's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
I understand that my contact information (name, firm name, email, phone, address) will be hidden from users until they pay $5 to unlock my profile
I consent to Yamalé displaying my professional information (title, expertise, location, experience, education, languages) publicly in the lawyer directory
I understand that Yamalé will verify my credentials before activating my profile
I will maintain accurate and current information in my profile
I will comply with all applicable professional rules and ethical standards
I understand that providing false or misleading information may result in immediate removal from the directory and possible legal action
I agree to monitor my registered email and WhatsApp regularly and will respond promptly to all client inquiries originating from the Yamalé Legal Platform
I understand that my profile will be subject to client ratings and reviews, including assessments of my responsiveness, professionalism, and quality of service
I acknowledge that failure to maintain satisfactory responsiveness ratings or repeated client complaints may result in warnings, profile suspension, or permanent removal from the directory
I commit to upholding professional standards in all communications, including providing timely responses to inquiries and respectfully declining matters I cannot accept

faq.title: Frequently asked

payg.a: All users (including free) can purchase additional documents and AI queries at the rates shown above. The lawyers network is available on the directory page. Subscribers get lower rates and included usage each month.

changePlans.a: Yes! Upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you pay the prorated difference. When downgrading, the change takes effect at your next billing cycle.

paymentMethods.q: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.a: We accept credit cards, debit cards, mobile money (M-Pesa, Orange Money, MTN, Airtel), and bank transfers for institutional accounts.

includedAmount.q: What happens after I use my included amount?
includedAmount.a: You can purchase additional usage at the pay-as-you-go rates shown for your tier, or upgrade to a higher tier for more included usage.

faq.disclaimer: Prices shown are in USD. Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled. Yamalé reserves the right to modify pricing with notice. The platform is provided as-is and does not constitute legal advice.

afcfta.heroTitle: The AfCFTA compliance infrastructure your business - or your ministry - needs.
afcfta.heroSubtitle: The first tool that walks you through every step and document required to legally ship goods across African borders under the Continental Free Trade Area.
afcfta.quoteBusiness: Understand the rules of every African market - at a price that makes sense.
afcfta.quoteMinistry: The AfCFTA compliance infrastructure your ministry - or your business - needs.
afcfta.comingSoonBody: Browse every step of the AfCFTA compliance journey below. Fields, checklists, downloads, and reset are read-only until we launch the live tool.
afcfta.disclaimerIntro: The AfCFTA Passport provides general guidance on cross-border trade compliance under the African Continental Free Trade Area. Requirements shown are based on available official sources and are updated regularly. However, implementation of AfCFTA rules varies by country and border crossing.
afcfta.disclaimerConfirm: Always confirm current requirements with the relevant customs authority before shipping.
afcfta.signInForTariff: Sign in to view the AfCFTA Tariff Schedule

journey.resetDisabledTitle: Reset is disabled in preview mode

common.reportsRemaining: {count, plural, one {# report remaining this month} other {# reports remaining this month}}
common.reportLimitReachedPlan: Report limit reached for your plan. Upgrade or purchase a report to download.
common.checkedBySystem: Checked by system – your product meets AfCFTA RVC
common.upgradePlanTitle: Upgrade your plan to run an interactive AfCFTA compliance check
common.fillStartFieldsTitle: Fill in all required fields on the Start step to continue

start.freeTierBody: You can explore the AfCFTA compliance steps here, but interactive inputs and downloadable reports are only available on paid plans.
start.welcomeIntro: Welcome! Let's check if your product qualifies for
start.infoPreferentialTariffs: Preferential (lower or zero) tariffs under the AfCFTA agreement when your product meets rules of origin and other requirements.
start.infoHsCode: Harmonized System code: international product classification used for customs and tariffs (e.g. 0101.21 for live horses).
start.hsCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code for your product
start.productLoaded: Product loaded from AfCFTA tariff schedule.
start.noTariffData: No tariff data found for this HS code yet.
start.signInPromptSuffix: to look up HS codes for your products.
start.hsLookupError: Could not look up this HS code right now.
start.productDescriptionPlaceholder: Enter an HS code above and blur to load from tariff schedule
start.productDescriptionHint: Filled automatically when the HS code is found in the AfCFTA tariff schedule.
start.infoExportingFrom: The country where your product was produced or where the last substantial transformation took place. This is used for rules of origin and certificates of origin.
start.exportingToHint: Where are you sending your products?
start.startButtonTitle: Fill in HS Code, Product Description, Exporting From, and Exporting To to continue

production.title: Production Cost Breakdown
production.intro: Enter the costs of making your product. We'll calculate how much comes from AfCFTA countries. You need at least {threshold}% to qualify for preferential tariffs.
production.whatsThisForSuffix: at least {threshold}% of your production costs must come from AfCFTA member countries.
production.whatsThisForBody: To qualify for AfCFTA tariff benefits, at least {threshold}% of your production costs must come from AfCFTA member countries.
production.infoTariffBenefits: Preferential (lower or zero) tariffs when trading under the AfCFTA agreement, subject to rules of origin.
production.uploadInvoicesBody: For each input, please upload the supplier invoice (PDF, JPG, or PNG). Our OCR technology will automatically verify the details and help speed up customs clearance.
production.infoAfcftaContent: Sum of costs from inputs sourced in AfCFTA member countries. Used to calculate Regional Value Content (RVC).
production.infoRvc: AfCFTA content ÷ total cost × 100%. You need at least 40% RVC to qualify for AfCFTA preferential tariffs.

origin.title: Rules of Origin Check
origin.intro: Let's see if your product qualifies for AfCFTA preferential tariffs based on where it's made.
origin.goodNews: Good News! Your product qualifies for AfCFTA preferential tariffs. Your Regional Value Content (RVC) is {rvc}%, which meets the required {threshold}%.
origin.notYetMet: Your product does not yet meet the RVC threshold. Your Regional Value Content (RVC) is {rvc}%; you need at least {threshold}%. Increase AfCFTA-sourced inputs to qualify.
origin.canClaimReduced: You can claim reduced tariffs when exporting to {dest}
origin.needCertificateOfOrigin: You'll need a Certificate of Origin
origin.infoCertificateOfOrigin: Official document proving your product meets AfCFTA rules of origin. Required by customs for preferential tariff treatment. Use the AfCFTA template.
origin.keepRecords: Keep records of your production costs for at least 5 years
origin.rvcFormula: AfCFTA-sourced cost ÷ total cost × 100 = RVC. Threshold: {threshold}%. Go back to Production to adjust inputs.

ntb.selectRoutePrompt: Select your route in Start to see requirements
ntb.ntbIntro: Non-tariff barriers are licences, certificates, and standards you must meet for your goods to enter the destination market.
ntb.infoNtb: Non-tariff barriers are rules, procedures, or standards (e.g. licences, SPS certificates, quality standards) that affect trade without being a customs tariff. They must be met for your goods to enter the destination market.
ntb.selectDestBanner: Select a destination country in the Start step to see import requirements for your export market. Your actionable checklist is on the last step.
ntb.documentsExportHint: Papers you must have to clear goods for export from {country}.
ntb.documentsImportHint: Papers required by {country} customs to clear your shipment at arrival.
ntb.regulatoryExportHint: Permits, licences or certificates that may be required by law.
ntb.regulatoryImportHint: Permits, health certificates or approvals that may be required by {country}.
ntb.complianceExportHint: Things to keep in mind when exporting from {country}.
ntb.complianceImportHint: Things to keep in mind when importing into {country}.

tariff.title: Your Tariff Savings
tariff.intro: Here's how much you can save on tariffs over time with AfCFTA preferential rates.
tariff.loadingRates: Loading tariff rates for your product and destination…
tariff.notFound: No tariff schedule found for this HS code and destination country. Complete the Start step with an HS code and "Exporting To" that exist in the tariff schedule.
tariff.loadError: Could not load tariff rates. Try again later.
tariff.infoMfn: Most Favoured Nation rate: the standard tariff applied to imports from non-preferential trading partners.
tariff.shipmentValuePrompt: Calculate your savings: What is your typical shipment value?
tariff.savingsBasis: Based on {rate}% savings vs MFN for {phase} rate.

checklist.title: Your Compliance Checklist
checklist.introPreview: Here are the documents and steps you need to complete. Preview only — checklist interaction is disabled.
checklist.introInteractive: Here are the documents and steps you need to complete. Click each item when done.
checklist.fallbackProductionCostsSub: Keep invoices and receipts for 5 years
checklist.fallbackCommercialInvoiceSub: With HS code and AfCFTA claim

sps.title: Phytosanitary / SPS certificate
sps.description: Agricultural and food products need health certification for export to {dest}.
sps.howToGet: Contact the Plant Protection Service (or equivalent) in {origin}. Time: 3–5 business days | Cost: typically $50–150.

coo.title: Certificate of origin (AfCFTA template)
coo.description: Mandatory for preferential tariff treatment when exporting to {dest}.
coo.howToGet: Obtain from your chamber of commerce or designated authority in {origin}. Use the AfCFTA template.

importPermit.title: Import permit (if required by destination)
importPermit.description: {dest} may require an import permit or licence for certain products. Check the destination country's trade authority.
importPermit.howToGet: Apply via the relevant ministry or agency in {dest} (importer applies). Allow 1–4 weeks.

customs.title: Customs declaration
customs.description: Must be filed with the correct HS code for clearance in {dest}.
customs.howToGet: Submit through your customs broker or {dest} customs portal. Required for all shipments.

standards.title: Product standards – compliant
standards.description: Your product meets AfCFTA quality standards. No additional testing needed for this category.

advisory.startPhase1: Start with Phase 1 in the implementation programme. Progress is saved to your account as you complete each document.
